seoTitle: How to Set Up Payment Methods in Gumroad
metaDescription: Learn how to configure your Gumroad payout currency, link a bank account or PayPal, and understand which payment options buyers see at checkout.
intro: Getting your payment settings right on Gumroad ensures you receive earnings smoothly and that buyers see the payment options they expect. This guide covers setting your base currency, linking your payout method, and understanding how Gumroad automatically displays supported payment options to customers.

steps.heading: Open your payments and payouts settings
steps.body: Go to your dashboard's settings area to find the payments and payouts directory.

steps.heading: Set your country and currency
steps.body: Confirm your country profile and default currency so your storefront pricing displays correctly.

steps.heading: Link a payout method
steps.body: Add your bank details or connect a verified PayPal business account to receive earnings.

steps.heading: Review supported checkout options
steps.body: Understand that Gumroad automatically handles which payment methods, like credit cards or mobile wallets, appear to buyers.

steps.heading: Complete identity verification
steps.body: Finish any required verification steps so payouts process without holds.

faq.question: Which payment methods can buyers use on Gumroad?
faq.answer: Buyers typically see options like credit cards and PayPal, with the exact set determined automatically by Gumroad based on region and device.

faq.question: Do I need to manually enable each payment method?
faq.answer: No, Gumroad handles the checkout payment routing automatically once your payout account is set up.

faq.question: Can I receive payouts in a different currency than my sales?
faq.answer: Your payout currency is generally tied to your account's country and banking setup.

faq.question: What happens if my identity isn't verified yet?
faq.answer: Payouts may be held until you complete the required identity verification steps.
